subcodes.first_line: The Most Great Book calleth aloud unto the nations, proclaiming: By God! The Mother Book hath verily appeared from the presence of God, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الکتاب الاعظم ینادی الامم و یقول تالله قد ظهر ام الکتاب من لدی الله العزیز الوهاب
